## Source: amazon-inspector (508e68df7788049a51c684d3038db25fb043a5dda88579108c5eb49eacbfff95)

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (c449b795f84201195315183f1bb5c85b932f39c9cce1260225aec17eee7c8344)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'pro-express' @ 1.0.0 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package executes one or more commands associated with malicious behavior.
